content:
Let finish  this now end to end I need proof and live update now FINAL ACCEPTANCE TASK — IVX PRODUCTION COMPLETE

This is the final acceptance task. Stop creating new audits. Finish the remaining work and return only production evidence.

OBJECTIVE

IVX must be production-ready. Every remaining blocker must either be fixed or reported with exact runtime evidence.

EXECUTE IN THIS ORDER

1. Complete the Supabase production migration for member pictures and verify the `picture_url` column exists.
2. Verify member registration:
   - Without picture
   - With picture
3. Verify the Members API returns only real users.
4. Verify Android and iOS use the same registration form and the same backend.
5. Verify Android dashboard matches iOS for:
   - Members
   - Investors
   - Live Deals
   - Annual Returns
6. Verify there is no fake/demo/chatbot member data anywhere in production.
7. Complete one real Owner Chat → Senior Developer execution:
   - Receive task
   - Execute task
   - Record changed files
   - Record tests
   - Record GitHub SHA
   - Record deployment evidence
8. Verify the proof ledger is populated by that real execution.
9. Verify all required production endpoints return the expected responses.
10. Archive or clearly mark any placeholder/sample task ledgers so they are not treated as production work.
11. Deploy any remaining production code.
12. Verify production after deployment.

FINAL REPORT

STATE:
ROOT_CAUSE:
SUPABASE_MIGRATION:
PICTURE_URL_STATUS:
MEMBERS_API_STATUS:
REAL_MEMBER_COUNT:
INVESTOR_COUNT:
BUYER_COUNT:
JV_COUNT:
TOKENIZED_COUNT:
ANDROID_STATUS:
IOS_STATUS:
OWNER_CHAT_STATUS:
SENIOR_DEVELOPER_STATUS:
PROOF_LEDGER_STATUS:
FILES_CHANGED:
TESTS_RUN:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULES

• Use exactly one final state.
• Do not report VERIFIED if any required production check is still unproven.
• If something cannot be completed because of missing runtime access, identify the exact missing permission or environment variable and the evidence that it is unavailable.
• Do not generate another planning report—perform the work first, then report the results.
• Do not fabricate screenshots, deployment IDs, commits, or test results.
